holdings.infoBox: TMVE is an equity ETF with a total of 85 individual holdings. The top holdings are MKS Inc. stock at 2.34%, M&T Bank at 2.33%, Ssc Government Mm Gvmxx at 1.98%, U.S. Bancorp at 1.98%, and Simmons First National at 1.95%.

overview.description: The Thrivent Mid Cap Value ETF (TMVE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a portfolio of undervalued US mid-cap companies. The fund uses fundamental analysis to select equity securities. TMVE was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Thrivent.
